description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-tree-view` (T2-36). 4/6 libraries — healthcare: org charts, taxonomy browsers.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tree-view/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, tree item typing, expand/collapse state, selected item, multi-select typing
2. Accessibility — `role="tree"` on container, `role="treeitem"` on items, `aria-expanded` on expandable items, `aria-selected`, `aria-level`, keyboard (arrows navigate, Enter selects, Right expands, Left collapses/moves to parent, Home/End), axe-core pass
3. Tests — expand/collapse, keyboard navigation (full ARIA tree pattern), selection, multi-select, async children loading
4. Storybook — nested items, checkboxes, icons, async loading, multi-select
5. CSS — tree indentation, expand icon, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, virtualized for large trees if implemented
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, server-side tree structure

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tree-view/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-tree-view — T2-36 antagonistic quality review
